title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・霹靂に刃向かいて

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'll surpass my limits once more... right here, and right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrack!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan makes a break for it! And she takes
the lead!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Mejiro Ardan! She just crossed the line in first place! The daughter of the Mejiro family overtook both Oguri Cap and Tamamo Cross to seize the win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(I... I actually won! I surpassed my limits once
again!)

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, ya got me good. You were da heart of the
hurricane out there.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Tamamo...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Congrats. You deserved the win. You really ran
like da wind.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Lemme tell you something, though. Things are
gonna be different next time, so ya better watch
out!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's right, they will be.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't intend to lose next time either. Not to
you, and not to Tama.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I'm honored.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
And I shan't give either of you any ground
whatsoever when next we race. Victory shall be
mine... as it was today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head out to meet Mejiro Ardan, who's receiving
a standing ovation for her astonishing win.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Without you, Trainer, and without those I ran
alongside today, I would not have found this
success.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Furthermore... I'm now certain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That as long as I have rivals—such as Tamamo
Cross and Oguri Cap—to race alongside me with
everything they have...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Then my body will be able to overcome endless
limits... and both the radiance I emit and the trail
of light will come to shine on into eternity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after seizing such an outstanding victory,
Mejiro Ardan's desire to improve still burns
strong!
choice_data_list: Let's win the Osaka Hai next!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the traditional route? That race determines
the finest medium-distance runner of the spring,
doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall utilize this newfound sensation to shine
brighter still during my senior year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you continue to provide me with your
guidance and support as we take this next step
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with our new goal in mind, Mejiro Ardan
and I set off towards senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meanwhile, unbeknownst to us...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's Mejiro Ardan! She just crossed the line in first place! The daughter of the Mejiro family has just pulled off a majestic upset!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe it... These racers are so strong...
and Ardan's beating them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: While I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (...It's okay. I can get stronger.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: (No. I have to get stronger...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
(...In order to become a worthy rival to Chiyono
O when she returns to the races someday!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai—there, I shall put on an even
more radiant performance!
